Check the constraint\\n            if \\\"const\\\" in schema:\\n                if value != schema[\\\"const\\\"]:\\n                    return False\\n            elif \\\"minimum\\\" in schema:\\n                if not isinstance(value, (int, float)):\\n                    return False\\n                if value < schema[\\\"minimum\\\"]:\\n                    return False\\n            elif \\\"type\\\" in schema:\\n                if schema[\\\"type\\\"] == \\\"boolean\\\":\\n                    if value != schema.get(True, False):\\n                        return False\\n\\n    if \\\"required\\\" in if_cond:\\n        for req in if_cond[\\\"required\\\"]:\\n            if req not in instance:\\n                return False\\n\\n    return True\\n\\n\\ndef validate_schema(schema: dict, instance: dict, path: str = \\\"\\\") -> list:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Validate instance against schema, return list of errors.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    errors = []\\n\\n    # The 'if' condition is true, check 'then' constraint\\n                    then_schema = constraint[\\\"then\\\"]\\n\\n                    # Check nested properties in 'then'\\n                    if \\\"properties\\\" in then_schema:\\n                        for prop, prop_schema in then_schema[\\\"properties\\\"].items():\\n                            if prop in instance:\\n                                if \\\"properties\\\" in prop_schema:\\n                                    for nested, nested_schema in prop_schema[\\\"properties\\\"].items():\\n                                        if nested in instance[prop]:\\n                                            actual = instance[prop][nested]\\n                                            if \\\"const\\\" in nested_schema:\\n                                                if actual != nested_schema[\\\"const\\\"]:\\n                                                    msg = f\\\"{path}{prop}.{nested}: expected {nested_schema['const']}, got {actual}\\\"\\n                                                    if \\\"errorMessage\\\" in constraint:\\n                                                        msg = constraint[\\\"errorMessage\\\"]\\n                                                    errors.append(msg)\\n\\n                    # Check the constraint\n            if \"const\" in schema:\n                if value != schema[\"const\"]:\n                    return False\n            elif \"minimum\" in schema:\n                if not isinstance(value, (int, float)):\n                    return False\n                if value < schema[\"minimum\"]:\n                    return False\n            elif \"type\" in schema:\n                if schema[\"type\"] == \"boolean\":\n                    if value != schema.get(True, False):\n                        return False\n\n    if \"required\" in if_cond:\n        for req in if_cond[\"required\"]:\n            if req not in instance:\n                return False\n\n    return True\n\n\ndef validate_schema(schema: dict, instance: dict, path: str = \"\") -> list:\n    \"\"\"Validate instance against schema, return list of errors.\"\"\"\n    errors = []\n\n    # Check allOf constraints\n    if \"allOf\" in schema:\n        for constraint in schema[\"allOf\"]:\n            if \"if\" in constraint and \"then\" in constraint:\n                if evaluate_condition(instance, constraint[\"if\"]):\n                    # The 'if' condition is true, check 'then' constraint\n                    then_schema = constraint[\"then\"]\n\n                    # Check nested properties in 'then'\n                    if \"properties\" in then_schema:\n                        for prop, prop_schema in then_schema[\"properties\"].items():\n                            if prop in instance:\n                                if \"properties\" in prop_schema:\n                                    for nested, nested_schema in prop_schema[\"properties\"].items():\n                                        if nested in instance[prop]:\n                                            actual = instance[prop][nested]\n                                            if \"const\" in nested_schema:\n                                                if actual != nested_schema[\"const\"]:\n                                                    msg = f\"{path}{prop}.{nested}: expected {nested_schema['const']}, got {actual}\"\n                                                    if \"errorMessage\" in constraint:\n                                                        msg = constraint[\"errorMessage\"]\n                                                    errors.append(msg)\n\n                    #
